descriptionShort: Humboldt Broncos defenceman Rob Rice and right winger Duncan Ryhorchuk named to Centennial Cup all-star squad; Richmond Sockeyes face Humboldt in final.
descriptionLong: Humboldt Broncos defenceman Rob Rice and right winger Duncan Ryhorchuk were selected to the Centennial Cup all-star squad announced Friday at the Uniplex. Coach Bernie Lynch praised their performances during the tournament. Richmond Sockeyes and Humboldt Broncos were set to meet in the championship final at 7:30 p.m. Humboldt's Bill McDougall led scoring with four goals and seven points in round-robin play.

attribution.headline: Humboldt's Rice, Ryhorchuk named Centennial Cup all-stars
